attributes.title: [Airflow OTel] Tasks & Errors
attributes.description: Task throughput, failure rate, operator breakdown, and duration metrics.

params.markdown:
## [Airflow OTel] Tasks & Errors

Task throughput, failures, operator breakdown, and duration.

query.esql:
TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.ti.start IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.ti.start)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.ti.start IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.ti.start)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.ti.finish IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.ti.finish)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.ti.finish IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.ti.finish)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.ti_failures IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.ti_failures)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.ti_failures IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.ti_failures)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.tasks.killed_externally IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.scheduler.tasks.killed_externally)

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.tasks.killed_externally IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(airflow.scheduler.tasks.killed_externally)

attributes.title: Task Success vs Failure Over Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| STATS successes = SUM(airflow.ti_successes) WHERE airflow.ti_successes IS NOT NULL, failures = SUM(airflow.ti_failures) WHERE airflow.ti_failures IS NOT NULL BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| STATS successes = SUM(airflow.ti_successes) WHERE airflow.ti_successes IS NOT NULL, failures = SUM(airflow.ti_failures) WHERE airflow.ti_failures IS NOT NULL BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.operator_failures IS NOT NULL
| EVAL op = COALESCE(attributes.operator, "unknown")
| STATS failures = SUM(airflow.operator_failures) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), op
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.operator_failures IS NOT NULL
| EVAL op = COALESCE(attributes.operator, "unknown")
| STATS failures = SUM(airflow.operator_failures) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), op
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.dag.metrics_generator.work_task_1.duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS p95 = PERCENTILE(airflow.dag.metrics_generator.work_task_1.duration, 95.0), avg = AVG(airflow.dag.metrics_generator.work_task_1.duration) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.dag.metrics_generator.work_task_1.duration IS NOT NULL
| STATS p95 = PERCENTILE(airflow.dag.metrics_generator.work_task_1.duration, 95.0), avg = AVG(airflow.dag.metrics_generator.work_task_1.duration) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.ti_failures IS NOT NULL
| STATS failures = SUM(airflow.ti_failures) BY dag_id = COALESCE(attributes.dag_id, "unknown")
| SORT failures DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.ti_failures IS NOT NULL
| STATS failures = SUM(airflow.ti_failures) BY dag_id = COALESCE(attributes.dag_id, "unknown")
| SORT failures DESC
| LIMIT 20
